architecture.summary: 4 files modified: sync-progress.ts (remove auto-mapping), ado-client.ts (add title filter + searchWorkItemByTitle), external-issue-auto-creator.ts (Layer 3 dedup), providers/ado.ts (response.ok check)

integrations.summary: ADO REST API WIQL title search for Layer 3 dedup. Same pattern as GitHub searchIssueByTitle.

ui-ux.summary: No UI changes. Backend-only sync fixes.

performance.summary: One extra WIQL query before Feature creation. Adds ~500ms but prevents duplicate work items.

security.summary: No security changes. WIQL query uses existing PAT auth.

edge-cases.summary: WIQL title search matches by exact title + specweave tag. Empty results handled. Metadata loss triggers search instead of creating duplicates.
